page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-8-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 8 vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is configured with 32 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4 GB of memory per core. Storage is bundled with a single 402 GB local NVMe SSD, and there are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance and Geekbench text processing scoring in the top 25%. Most other compute metrics, including multi-core performance, software compilation, and cryptography tests, fall within the average range. However, the server exhibits a bottleneck in large-block uncached memory operations, with read and write bandwidths landing in the bottom 25% and bottom 10% respectively.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and integrated high-speed local NVMe SSD, this server offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring fast local scratch space without the overhead of network-attached storage. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, database operations, static web serving, and text processing tasks that benefit from strong single-core execution and local storage.
description: The Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-8-lssd is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 vCPUs and 32 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 4 physical cores. It includes a dedicated 402 GB local NVMe SSD for high-speed local storage. Benchmarks show strong single-core CPU performance and text processing capabilities, though large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 10%. Most other metrics, including multi-core execution, database operations, and web serving throughput, perform in the average tier. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, and web serving applications that require fast local storage.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-8-lssd is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 402 GB local NVMe SSD. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor and delivers strong single-core performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-8-lssd is an x86_64 server with 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 402 GB local NVMe SSD, powered by an AMD EPYC CPU.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing and integrated high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores
32 GB of system memory providing 4 GB per vCPU
Integrated 402 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Strong single-core CPU and text processing performance
Suited for general-purpose workloads, databases, and web serving
